home.whyDesc: From formulation to finished product, we deliver quality, speed and flexibility for global private-label brands.
home.reason1Desc: 18 years of formulation expertise across toilet cleaning blocks, air fresheners and liquid detergents — ready for fast custom development.
home.reason2Desc: Automated filling and packaging lines with strict in-line QC, ensuring stable quality and on-time delivery for global brands.
home.reason3Desc: WOOLWORTHS approved supplier, ISSA member and Level 3 Safety Production certified — a verified manufacturing partner.
home.reason4Desc: Bio-degradable, eco-friendly raw materials with controlled pH — safe for families and gentle on the environment.
home.reason5Desc: Our products serve retailers and brands across North America, Europe, Australia, the Middle East, Asia and beyond.
home.reason6Desc: From formula, packaging, regulatory to logistics — we manage every step so you can focus on your brand.
home.servicesTitle: Our Services Always Go The Extra Mile
home.service1Desc: Bulk goods are transported by sea at a low cost usually.
home.service2Desc: If hurry, we can send the goods by air as well at an extra cost.
home.service3Desc: We have a 3rd party QC to guarantee the quality.
home.service4Desc: The materials we used are eco-friendly and bio-degradable.
home.service6Desc: Contact us at anytime to solve your after-sale problem.

about.title: About Myklens
about.subtitle: Founded in 2005, Myklens specializes in toilet cleaning blocks, air fresheners and liquid detergents — trusted on five continents and serving global brands as a certified OEM / ODM partner.
about.storyText: Founded in 2005, Myklens specializes in toilet cleaning blocks, air fresheners and liquid detergents. Certified by WOOLWORTHS and an ISSA member, our products reach five continents with authentic international quality.
about.teamText: With 18 years of expertise and Level 3 Safety Production certification, our dedicated team ensures consistent quality that keeps global buyers returning. From R&D to logistics, we deliver trust in every product.
about.modernDesc: World-class hardware is the foundation of outstanding quality. Fully automated lines and a top-tier R&D lab keep capability within reach.
about.journeyDesc: Two decades of dedication, building world-class home-cleaning manufacturing capability — every milestone proves our commitment.
about.whyPartnerDesc: From formulation to finished product — we control every key stage to deliver an irreplicable competitive edge.
about.rdText: Myklens runs a dedicated cleaning R&D laboratory with 18 years of formulation expertise across toilet cleaning blocks, air fresheners and liquid detergents — supporting custom fragrances, plant-based extracts and gentle, family-safe formulations.
about.qcText: Our facility is certified under Level 3 Safety Production. We are a WOOLWORTHS-approved supplier and ISSA member — every batch goes through stability, microbial and visual inspections before shipment to ensure worry-free global export.
about.sustainText: We practice green manufacturing — phosphate-free, brightener-free and biodegradable formulas. Our packaging supports PCR (Post-Consumer Recycled) plastic, helping your brand fulfill its ESG commitments.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Whether you need OEM/ODM manufacturing, formula customization, or bulk purchasing — our senior business managers will reply within 24 hours.
contact.globalSupportDesc: Myklens has a worldwide sales and service network. Our representatives across multiple time zones respond fast and accurately to your B2B manufacturing inquiries.

oemOdm.metaDesc: End-to-end OEM and ODM home cleaning manufacturing — R&D, large-scale production, one-stop service, certified QC, custom packaging and successful global brand cases.
oemOdm.heroDesc: From formula and packaging design to mass production and global logistics — we manufacture premium home cleaning products under your brand.
oemOdm.s1Desc: Our R&D team has spent 18 years developing and refining home-cleaning formulas — toilet cleaning blocks, air fresheners and liquid detergents — that balance performance, safety and sustainability.
oemOdm.rd1: Mature formulations for toilet cleaning blocks, air fresheners and liquid detergents
oemOdm.rd2: In-house chemists with 18 years of home-cleaning expertise
oemOdm.rd3: Stability, microbial and compatibility testing capability
oemOdm.s2Desc: A 20,000 m² automated smart factory with 12 dedicated filling lines guarantees on-time delivery for high-volume retail launches.
oemOdm.s3Title: From idea to shelf — all under one roof.
oemOdm.s3Desc: We handle every step of the manufacturing journey so your team can focus on brand and sales.
oemOdm.flow1Desc: Briefing call to understand your brand positioning, target market and budget.
oemOdm.flow2Desc: Match from our existing library or co-develop a new exclusive formula and packaging.
oemOdm.flow3Desc: Free physical samples within 7-15 days; iterate fragrance, color and pack.
oemOdm.flow4Desc: Automated filling lines with 100% in-line QC; flexible MOQ.
oemOdm.flow5Desc: Pre-shipment inspection, COA, MSDS, and target-market regulatory documents.
oemOdm.flow6Desc: FOB / CIF / DDP shipping support across five continents via trusted forwarders.
oemOdm.s4Desc: Strict QC at every production stage — backed by globally recognized standards and third-party audits.
oemOdm.cust1Desc: Concentration, fragrance, color, plant-based or eco-certified options.
oemOdm.cust2Desc: Bottle, pouch, sheet, sachet, tablet — customizable shape, label and gift box.
oemOdm.cust3Desc: Region-specific labeling: FDA, EU CLP, GHS, halal certification on request.
oemOdm.cust4Desc: Logo printing, embossing, multi-language artwork and brand-book alignment.
oemOdm.s6Desc: We've manufactured private-label home cleaning lines for retailers and DTC brands across five continents.
oemOdm.ctaTitle: Ready to launch your private label?
oemOdm.ctaDesc: Tell us about your brand vision. Our key account managers will reply within 24 hours with a tailored proposal.

landingGoogle.heroTitle: Build Your Home Care Brand With A Trusted Factory.
landingGoogle.heroDesc: Myklens manufactures toilet cleaning blocks, air fresheners, laundry scent beads, appliance cleaners and liquid detergents for global private-label brands.
landingGoogle.videoDesc: From formulation to final shipment, we manage the complete process.
landingGoogle.linesTitle: Fast-moving home cleaning products for private label growth.
landingGoogle.linesDesc: Choose mature product systems or create a customized formula for your market.
landingGoogle.line1Desc: Long-lasting freshness, stain prevention and powerful bathroom care for retail and private-label brands.
landingGoogle.line2Desc: Premium fragrance beads with customizable scents, colors, packaging and market positioning.
landingGoogle.line3Desc: Safe descaling and appliance-care formulas for daily home cleaning product portfolios.
landingGoogle.whyTitle: Why advertisers and brand owners choose Myklens.
landingGoogle.whyDesc: For Google and Facebook traffic, your landing page must quickly prove product value, supply capability and trust. Myklens gives buyers a clear path from idea to shipment.
landingGoogle.benefit1Desc: Create market-ready formulas for fragrance, cleaning power, sustainability and family-safe positioning.
landingGoogle.benefit2Desc: Support for bottle, pouch, blister, carton and display packaging with your brand identity.
landingGoogle.benefit3Desc: Modern production lines, in-line QC and stable lead times for bulk international orders.
landingGoogle.benefit4Desc: Experienced with global buyers across North America, Europe, Australia, the Middle East and Asia.
